subject: No War with Iran - Rally in Eugene Saturday at 3 pm
body:
| | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/_gA/ni0YAA/t.2y4/LADF8FlER5qGyPs6nmwjxQ/h0/EITbMdFK8sEmH288ys-2B-2Fh8ph-2FrB9A6-2BM0i5qCb2xsCyiK7xXkJftbeIVM7HbMWah-2F-2FTUy7T-2FpE-2Ban7TzilxtVHMJk6Ko3XMudiK22ctjhsmRptTnUeLyseIwv7dBH7189k235LhIn22ec3GC3KosYUIrhv-2BmhmvicI3b3OUosXOzhFd6vHQl4u2BdTp9-2FqXwTBJnvRd3iiBYLRwesGeH-2BSg36XjoxaO4Y5sp0yZM5Wb-2FWDU9ZearVJu-2Fzfch5uOkJCiOPRgNz-2FKdkor5LxeCyTaj-2FnrcXp-2FiKUEeS2T-2FEHbLE3RVoVs6TJjTbdWvEwpWESQtE5gHQTBy0BEfaej7-2F-2FOol-2FlpfAUY8u-2F9P1q5OZM-3D/dWzK)

The situation that Trump has escalated with Iran is truly dangerous. After his impeachment and facing a reelection, he has done what many of us have long feared he would: torn up the Iran nuclear deal, stacked his inner circle with warmongers, and brought us to the brink of another endless war. Congress could have and should have acted sooner to remove him. Now, we cannot allow for any more delay. I have spent my life taking a stand for peace, and I won't stop now. I know that you'll stand with me in Eugene tomorrow to speak out and stop this war!
---
[ **RSVP TODAY** ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/_gA/ni0YAA/t.2y4/LADF8FlER5qGyPs6nmwjxQ/h1/CA0gLXQEKb6jqGkD7RqZieSiR1xt6h2zAPrrZKB7vwkKHMjFypR2IqdhrMo0xFHMHaYQqzkhXFsHvaluCO4i7szhvpC00qfe8XaFCxt7q5snOXn90Iiz6ZXbnyQ4toQ7cr3-2FjORf3dzHDFHY8vXFSy6dnbnY4prEjeLpLYHrhhATkXilG7NHIszqupzXsFu4YI1yRMNng5CImRmo-2BhmRQr-2FHqUAqurbHEabrprODHZrqRiIPaynPhSFlVE1y3XoVXtjK7VG1yGISCyGPGv0wqlsIKTOwNGvBy3V53Yf5TY495NmjNtEmmZk4PwrZ0h9-2F/r1h3)
---
U.S. airstrikes, ordered by Trump himself, assassinated top Iranian military General Qassem Suleimani. Iran has vowed to retaliate and now 3,500 US troops are on their way to the Middle East. This situation is fast moving and extremely volatile. This is reckless, illegal, and unilateral action by Trump, which could touch off war that kills thousands, possibly millions. While the weapons makers, oil companies, and war profiteers cheer -- we must resist and stand strong for peace. For far too long, lawmakers have been beholden to the Military Industrial Complex that profits from invasions, bombing, drones, and detention. That's why I will never take a dime from the corporations that will profit from war with Iran and will do everything I can to stop it. **Join us on Saturday to speak out for: **
* An immediate intervention by Congress to repeal the 2001 AUMF that gave the president authority to wage the forever wars, an explicit revocation of any authorization for war with Iran, and immediate censure of the president for this illegal action.
* Solidarity with our Muslim, Persian, Arab and other neighbors who become the targets of warmongering, racist hate.
* Uplift the voices of veterans who have served in their opposition to this action and calls to bring all troops home from Iraq.
* To show the world that Oregon doesn't want war!

Onward, Doyle
---
|
---
Doyle Canning is running for Congress in Oregon's 4th Congressional District. Doyle is rejecting all corporate PAC money in this campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters like you! [You can make a contribution to her campaign here.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/_gA/ni0YAA/t.2y4/LADF8FlER5qGyPs6nmwjxQ/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJfvvN8qBuq7ZECa2iJJ-2FwvL-2FC3zsJLkevjuMTYijabCljKKjcggGX5uLBaECFkLvAaWoUkU0LDaMIxiN64JrMUpUcsQdNEut-2F4nG7WVg0FZxXxmGTaaEQf9GyYaD3gxW-2FoSpyqIyZbWP4j2PjaNccN1wb-2BZXvn-2BELeiDJCXAscox-2B0q5IE3Kw3lGBuzCylIxRgRoPgCk-2FBAC-2Bcn3tsHjSEdpLehI-2F3uX6MDUMyWAnspwEdExI8GqrAkgcbKX-2BuPpAzdicaU0S-2FwGVcxkiCN-2B8gOSaGFKubXXjH3RkVv0gKY2kQPhl810f-2B20Bw0SdaqTQ-3D/gIa0 "Donate to Doyle Canning")

name: Booker HQ
subject: I think our underdog campaign is going to surprise a lot of people.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| It takes a lot of resources to win the Iowa caucus. Hey team, Mike Frosolone here, Cory's state director here in Iowa. As I write to you, the Iowa caucus is right around the corner. **As of today, we 're exactly a month away from the night that caucus-goers throughout our state will officially begin the 2020 Democratic primary process.** We're putting ourselves in the best possible position to win when caucus night rolls around on February 3rd. But, we could still use some extra help to really put us over the top. We're going to need all the resources we can get for precinct captains as they organize their neighborhoods. It's important that our organizers have the supplies they need to knock on doors and turn out Iowans to caucus for Cory Booker. I'd love to make sure that our volunteers have extra phones to call supporters as well as transportation to get around the state (and it's always great to be able to buy them pizza as a thank you for their hard work, too!). **[In other words, it takes a lot of resources to win the Iowa caucus. These are just a few of the important investments we'll need to make in the coming days. Can you pitch in right now to help?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cory2020-january?refcode=em_fr_20200103_BHQ_20200103-fr-BHQ-EM2-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** When we say that this is an underdog campaign, we mean it. We don't have the financial advantages of some of the other candidates in this race, like the self-funding billionaires. That means we have to make the most of what we have. We're very proud of the fact that we're considered to have one of the best campaign operations in the entire state. The organizers on our staff embody the spirit of "hope, hype, hustle," which has become our motto here on the Iowa team. We've also racked up a ton of endorsements from prominent local elected leaders and community activists -- which will be incredibly important come caucus night. I'm confident that we're in a strong position, but we still have more work to do. **[We need more resources to scale up our operation and run more ads to help convince Iowans that Cory is the best choice to move our country forward. Will you chip in today?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cory2020-january?refcode=em_fr_20200103_BHQ_20200103-fr-BHQ-EM2-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** This is a team worth investing in. I think our underdog campaign is going to surprise a lot of people. Mike Mike Frosolone
Iowa State Director
Cory 2020 [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cory2020-january?refcode=em_fr_20200103_BHQ_20200103-fr-BHQ-EM2-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f3c/5fca0d19/7b3eae6a/291cd7c0/3597049508/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f3c/5fca0d19/7b3eae6a/291cd7cf/3597049508/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f3c/5fca0d19/7b3eae6a/291cd7ce/3597049508/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f3c/5fca0d19/7b3eae6a/291cd7cd/3597049508/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f3c/5fca0d19/7b3eae6a/291cd7c1/3597049508/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Andrew Yang for President
subject: We are gaining on them
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
The only option we have at this moment is to put every ounce of energy and support we can into this campaign so we can go all the way.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=5463%2E377263%2EuKgq1n) Yang Gang --

In the days since we announced our $16.5 million fundraising haul for Q4 2019, we’ve seen other candidates report their numbers.

And the really good news is that we are _just_ behind the top four -- and barely behind Elizabeth Warren, whose campaign fundraising slowed down around 30% in the fourth quarter.

[If we want to remain in this race and continue to forge a strong path toward the White House, we have to make January the biggest month ever. 314 Action is a grassroots community of over 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. Folks, My colleagues in the House voted to impeach President Trump for his corrupt power grabs and complete disregard for democratic processes. If you agree, sign my petition to add your voice urging Senate Republicans to uphold their oaths of office and do right by the people!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/JDDdk1mZQ4Z-aUDC488geKibefmea7FLO1RHr9PuBq0=/cyK5HQ4oxunF1LCV52JAEdxyNidC1h23oCvTftm4ms0=) | **[SIGN THE PETITION ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/JDDdk1mZQ4Z-aUDC488geKibefmea7FLO1RHr9PuBq0=/cyK5HQ4oxunF1LCV52JAEdxyNidC1h23oCvTftm4ms0=)**

body:
These articles of impeachment are a sham and voters know it. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/93bf43c53819/calling-all-patriots-12096649?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=a4fbd5bf83&e=795c6d9796)

---
| Peter,

Wow. These quotes from everyday Oklahomans at a recent Kendra Horn townhall are incredible. “Since the election of 2018, has been concentrated on impeach President Trump. We want Congress to get back to work for the American people, please.” “Where was it ever fair to our president, the one we put in — that I voted for? And we’re mad. We’re mad as hell.” “He’s a duly elected president. And I feel it is not your responsibility to take somebody that was duly elected out of office. I think you’re in a lot of trouble if you vote for this impeachment.”

What did Kendra Horn do right after the town hall where these patriots expressed their views? [**She went to go impeach President Trump. **](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=2e3ee4b6b6&e=795c6d9796)

These voters are mad—and rightly so—that their vote for President Trump is getting sabotaged and undermined by the obstructionist impeachment-first Democrats.

And more importantly, they recognize that Kendra Horn is why this is all happening. She teamed up with radical leftists like AOC and Nancy Pelosi to open this impeachment inquiry and vote it through. This is all while she pretends to be a “moderate,” a complete lie. The truth is that Kendra Horn is a Pelosi rubber-stamp that votes with her 85% of the time.

When she voted for Pelosi's ridiculous articles of impeachment she put the final seal on her reputation as just another partisan Democrat.

The hardworking citizens of Oklahoma’s 5th district will vote for a Republican this year, I’m sure of it, but we have to make sure we send a rock-ribbed conservative who will fight for the Trump agenda that voters chose in 2016.

[**I’m ready and willing to fight. But we need your help. Will you donate just $5 to help us power our campaign and reach as many voters as possible? **](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=f02b6319e8&e=795c6d9796)
---
| [QUICK DONATE $5](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=8cd1185a23&e=795c6d9796 "QUICK DONATE $5")
---
| National Journal said this is the nation's **#1 battleground district.**

The Associated Press has called Oklahoma's 5th Congressional District "a seat both parties expect to work fiercely to win in 2020."

Decision Desk HQ said "OK-5 is guaranteed to be one of 2020's most bitterly fought House elections.

The 5th Congressional District is going to be ground zero for the fight to take back the House in 2020. [**That's why we need your help.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=517b63055f&e=795c6d9796)

**[Will you contribute just $5 to help us beat Kendra Horn and send a principled conservative to Congress?](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=fb8026d58d&e=795c6d9796) She has failed the conservative voters of this district and has to go.**

For Freedom,

[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=020a0717f3&e=795c6d9796) Janet Barresi

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: Roe v. Wade
body:
Everyone knew that was a ridiculous claim.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e45/4bef7a87/6aeace86/287f9d93/723440267/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends -
When Susan Collins voted to confirm Brett Kavanaugh, she said she didn't believe he and the Supreme Court would vote to overturn Roe v. Wade.
Everyone knew that was a ridiculous claim.
The president himself said it was going to happen the week before he nominated Brett Kavanaugh, and Republicans in the House and Senate have had this as a top priority for decades.
Now there is even less doubt:
Earlier this week, 39 Senators wrote a brief asking the Supreme Court to revisit Roe v. Wade. They want action, and they want it now.
And what is clear today -- more than ever -- is that Maine needs a Senator who will stand up for women's reproductive freedom, because Susan Collins has not.
Sara Gideon will be that champion. But she cannot do it alone:
**[Can you make a $3 contribution to Sara Gideon's campaign? She needs your help in what will be a very difficult and close election.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e45/4bef7a87/6aeace86/287f9d92/723440267/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMDQtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200104-full")**
While Brett Kavanaugh's biggest backers hold huge fundraisers for Susan Collins, it's up to us -- all of us -- to fight back. That is why your contribution is so important.
Thank you for chipping in.
All our best,
Team Sara

| | Peter, One of the things that horrifies me most about the modern Democratic Party is their complete and total support for abortion on demand.

Not only do they explicitly support abortion up until, or even after, the moment of birth, they also want your tax dollars funding it. It's sickening, and shows just how wayward their party has gone.

It also highlights how high the stakes are for us to take back the House this year for conservatives.

If we win, we can finally defund Planned Parenthood and fight for greater protections for the unborn.

But if Democrats hold onto power that will never happen, their extreme base won't let them.

[**Will you donate $5, $10, $15, $25, or even $50 to help us win this district and fight for life in Congress?**](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=e6950459db&e=90fad69796)

---
| This is a conservative district. It voted for President Trump by five points in 2016. We can flip it, I'm sure of it, but it's going to take resources that the other side is going to have in spades from the coasts.

There are only a few dozen competitive House races each year, and my race in IA-02 is going to be one of the most competitive. If we want to win the House back, we must win Iowa's 2nd Congressional District.

[**Please consider donating $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, or anything you can today so that we can flip IA-02 and fight for a basic Iowa value like life. **](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=91336eede7&e=90fad69796)

Bobby Schilling

body:

|

Hey Peter -- Here's the deal: When Texas voters get to know MJ and hear about her platform of acting on climate change, ending gun violence, and defending health care, **they want to support her**. And she's already traveled more than 11,000 miles to meet Texans from Houston to El Paso.

**But there 's another important component of our strategy to defeat Senator Cornyn: Ads. [Donate to our Texas Airwaves Fund >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648907ed/7f51f7bc/4ad987e1/4ef03f42/3009511132/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxNCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-adsfundnd?refcode=email_20200104.1nd__714__&amount=10")**

Digital and TV ads will help us tell MJ's story, share her platform, and show why she's the candidate who can beat the incumbent.

But ads are expensive and they require a sustained investment, especially here in Texas where there are 20 media markets to compete in. **That 's why we're launching our ambitious Texas Airwaves Fund and asking you to be a Founding Donor.

Will you make a donation (of whatever you can afford) to our Texas Airwaves Fund so we can create and air ads across the state to show Texans why MJ is the best candidate to represent them?**

subject: My team selected you for this survey, folks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
Folks,

Now that 2020 is in full swing, I want to take a moment and check in with you about your priorities for this election.

Traveling the state, I hear so many reasons why Coloradans want new leadership in Washington right now.

Republicans are trying to sabotage our health care. Climate change is threatening our future. Plus, more than 200 Republican lawmakers just asked the Supreme Court to reconsider Roe v. Wade and abortion rights. The list goes on and on, but we have a chance this year to win this election, flip the Senate, and make real progress on these important issues.

Based on his voting record, it's clear my incumbent Republican opponent is more concerned with pleasing the special interests backing his campaign than listening to Coloradans about what truly matters to them.

Now more than ever, we must come together to build a winning movement to take back Colorado and give people a leader they can put their trust in to do right by them. But the only way we'll win is if we set our priorities and follow through on them together.

That's why I'm hoping you'll take a moment to let me know what's on your mind and what issues matter most to you in this race. Click here to take my one-minute priorities survey now:

TAKE SURVEY: https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/january-issues-survey

>From the start, I've built my public service on listening as much as I talk. This campaign is about you, folks. That's why your input matters so much today.

Thanks. I'll be in touch.

-- John-------

name: U.S. Senator Ed Markey
subject: Australia is burning. Demand the Green New Deal now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
At least 14.5 million acres have been destroyed.
# [](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df84/693b8b0a/437978e4/72de7200/3374143205/VEsH/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-2020?refcode=em_header")

Friends -
Australia is burning.
[](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df84/693b8b0a/437978e4/72de7207/3374143205/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMDQtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/gnd-australia?source=em200104-full")
_Photo credit: Matthew Abbott for The New York Times_
The fires, fueled by climate change, come after Australia experienced its hottest and driest year on record. What's worse is that this isn't even considered peak fire season for Australia.
At least 14.5 million acres have been destroyed. That's almost the size of West Virginia and more than three times the area destroyed by California's wildfires in 2018.
The climate crisis is a present, global threat. **[If you agree we need the Green New Deal now, add your name.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df84/693b8b0a/437978e4/72de7207/3374143205/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMDQtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/gnd-australia?source=em200104-full")**
**[GREEN NEW DEAL NOW>>](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df84/693b8b0a/437978e4/72de7207/3374143205/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMDQtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/gnd-australia?source=em200104-full")**
The lack of immediate global action is infuriating. This catastrophe should send every single country into immediate action fighting the climate crisis, and the United States should be leading that fight.
The climate crisis is not some far off threat. It's happening now and will continue to devastate communities around the world if we do not take bold and immediate action.
We will not reach the scale of action we need globally if the United States does not lead on this issue. We can do that by passing the Green New Deal.
But we are running out of time. With the start of the new year, we're officially down to 10 years to prevent irreversible damage to our planet.
I promise that I will fight as hard as I can this year to pass a Green New Deal. But I need you in the trenches with me demanding action.
**[Are you in? Add your name right now to join me in demanding that Congress pass the Green New Deal. The future of our planet depends on us.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df84/693b8b0a/437978e4/72de7207/3374143205/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMDQtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/gnd-australia?source=em200104-full")**
I cannot do this alone. It's going to take a movement, and I need you to be part of this revolution.
\- Ed
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df84/693b8b0a/437978e4/72de7207/3374143205/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMDQtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/gnd-australia?source=em200104-full")**

name: John Delaney
subject: Sanders, Warren, and me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of John Delaney
body:
| [ ](https://go.johndelaney.com/page/m/29b906a1/30fd46cd/3237cf06/2357484d/2749682136/VEsH/?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://www.johndelaney.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=1+-+++&utm_campaign=em_2020.01.04_jkd_usatoday_all&source=em_2020.01.04_jkd_usatoday_all") Friends,

I've campaigned from coast to coast and the issue I hear about most is health care. It's one of the issues we won on in 2018 and helped us take back the House. I've said before that this is "the health care primary," because it's both so important to get right and where we can draw one of the biggest contrasts to Donald Trump in the general. **We have to get this right. We have to keep health care a winning issue for Democrats this fall.[I wrote an op-ed in today's USA Today explaining my plan, BetterCare, and how it differs from my opponents in this primary race.](https://go.johndelaney.com/page/m/29b906a1/30fd46cd/3237cf06/2357484c/2749682136/VEsE/?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://www.usatoday.com/story/opinion/2020/01/04/john-delaney-democrat-president-iowa-caucus-health-care-column/2803734001/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=2+-+I+wrote+an+oped+in+todays+USA+Today+expl&utm_campaign=em_2020.01.04_jkd_usatoday_all&source=em_2020.01.04_jkd_usatoday_all")**
> "Currently, only three candidates have detailed plans for universal access -- Sens. Elizabeth Warren and Bernie Sanders and I. Universal access is the right answer, both morally and economically. The plans advocated by Warren and Sanders, however, call for an extreme "single-payer" system, where the government is the only provider of coverage.
>
> Under BetterCare, Medicare is left alone, because it works, and every American from birth to 65 (seniors are on Medicare) is auto-enrolled in a free federal health care plan that covers basic health care needs. This ensures every American has health care coverage. But unlike the single-payer Medicare for All, Americans could still choose private insurance. They could "opt out" of the BetterCare plan and buy private insurance or receive insurance from their employer. If they "opt out" they would receive a health care tax credit to offset the cost of health care they purchase or that their employer provides.
[**I encourage you to read the full op-ed**](https://go.johndelaney.com/page/m/29b906a1/30fd46cd/3237cf06/2357484f/2749682136/VEsF/?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://www.usatoday.com/story/opinion/2020/01/04/john-delaney-democrat-president-iowa-caucus-health-care-column/2803734001/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=3+-+I+encourage+you+to+read+the+full+oped&utm_campaign=em_2020.01.04_jkd_usatoday_all&source=em_2020.01.04_jkd_usatoday_all") and share it with your friends and family on social media. We have to get this issue right this fall and I fully believe my plan is the best to run on and win on.

From the road in Iowa,
John

Folks, The Supreme Court’s 2010 decision on _Citizens United_ is at the core of the corruption that’s plagued our campaign finance system and our democracy for the last decade. As a result of this decision, shady Super PACs and billionaires were given the right to flood our airwaves with political advertising -- all while not disclosing important information on who’s bankrolling these special interest ads, many of which spread disinformation or outright false claims. [**We need 10,000 of our supporters to stand with us by signing our petition to urge Congress to reduce the influence of Big Money in our elections. Will you add your name?**](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=9f1c2ddd96cc44c9a29cb67a97331da1&_e=WY6kREqbaCen3aqEibnEt1n5_NQbXEp4oVGw4TI85vhI6J3KkW81VIUPKxSxDP9gtvgNf6xWs0cYp76PO7hHQOAozdvjhiyHdlnx1PF8SgmZlAiMBTI8ziz-JSbDOGXDsjay5O3yAWh9A1xcpIvV7oMpXKNbQIq3TcWgZ-4WgUbEcs1ddpOxXFfeH9tJdMGNfwUOR6ljMka-PMqSC-shVLWQD7CQmq0osCkrgu268oZt-fJ8sxhRMyVXl1vLIrCwqn3BFKSOF9jf_hAKA5PzjRQ4mcZ8pqeAeWXv-ipBe-CSpVE58Xdb4ZSSb5RMU9Nz) [SIGN ON: GET BIG MONEY OUT OF ELECTIONS](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=9f1c2ddd96cc44c9a29cb67a97331da1&_e=WY6kREqbaCen3aqEibnEt1n5_NQbXEp4oVGw4TI85vhI6J3KkW81VIUPKxSxDP9gtvgNf6xWs0cYp76PO7hHQOAozdvjhiyHdlnx1PF8SgmbNTtrOuaLb7qzCCyt1R7AGfFXFBl7WgsTYxSHFE6kKvU_Mc0yErqTsMXtphexVT9WucP79PZWuuOU_nVc2-_OjNEtaYSjr8L_vkvi5xXdxloKwe-MYO0LuXFV_e2rLQbmPUDeO_RlAnMy-7pQ_TW6whzlfOonz6zP4cWMyiTS6fZJvl_NWX72khjmp0A5A6y3KMyUj02k94MMJNgRk9dj) Wilmot Collins knows that allowing Super PACs and giant corporate interests to spend millions of dollars to support certain candidates and ideas puts the rest of us at a huge disadvantage. Through these Super PACs, the ultra-wealthy can buy elections and push the policies that directly benefit them. It also makes lawmakers beholden to these special interests rather than the people they represent. Corporate-friendly, pay-to-play politicians like Mitch McConnell and our opponent Steve Daines benefit from these Super PACs’ smear campaigns. If we’re going to take back our democracy, we need to elect leaders who are willing to put everything on the line to push back against a corrupt campaign finance system -- and that means ENDING _Citizens United._ [**Will you let us know if you’re with Wilmot in this important fight by signing your name to get Big Money out of our elections?**](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=9f1c2ddd96cc44c9a29cb67a97331da1&_e=WY6kREqbaCen3aqEibnEt1n5_NQbXEp4oVGw4TI85vhI6J3KkW81VIUPKxSxDP9gtvgNf6xWs0cYp76PO7hHQOAozdvjhiyHdlnx1PF8SglxGxGv7QYI3TagKZnVZ1YtkE61hQ5suWgwj3yfsgN7xEGfqKmJCzyOKHpoMXM3-5QWicm9VRmz_LcP6UM1hidxiX1UeyT9nOhGK30Dy9uOFepze_XWlG2r4znGFHkVh0u9mcBqUZYnQEObr0vb0gri8yEx_lE-0NynmzDYBi8z1yw1s26DK0uPZm2iyg8Y7gGOuQehOD-j_9ZqFllnsU9J) Thanks for showing your support, Team Wilmot

Hey friend, We hope you had some time over the holidays to look back on 2019 and set out your priorities and goals for the upcoming year. We definitely did, and they’re all about listening to you and taking your advice! In the six months since Tom launched this campaign, we’ve grown tremendously with new staff, volunteers, and TeamTom supporters. **That’s why we’re asking you to take our TeamTom Community Survey. name: Adm. Michael Franken (USN, ret.)
subject: This won't end well
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
Yesterday, the United States conducted an airstrike in Iraq that killed a powerful Iranian general. With this strike on foreign soil, the president has committed us to a course of action that leads us
|
---
| |
---

| | Yesterday, the United States conducted an airstrike in Iraq that killed a powerful Iranian general. **With this strike on foreign soil, the president has committed us to a course of action that leads us perilously close to another conflict in the Middle East.** The Administration has put countless lives at risk -- from abductions of Americans in the region, to attacks on our embassies, military compounds, and shipping lanes across the globe -- all for a feel-good tactical moment. Iran is in a corner -- a collapsing economy, internal strife, and the killing of a popular leader. **They will surely retaliate, and this will not end well.** Let me be clear, the United States has the capacity to defeat any adversary, but at what cost? From my 36 years in the Navy -- as an unrestricted line officer -- **I understand the necessity of operations like this, but I don 't believe this administration truly grasps the severity of this action. ** This is not the same as the operation to kill Osama bin Laden or al Baghdadi. Iran is not some irregular force comprised of loosely-connected individual cells and fanatics on pickup trucks -- it is a nation of over 80 million with a standing army, an air force, navy, and the capacity to conduct tactical operations across the entire region and beyond. **When the Pentagon was discussing the invasion of Iraq in 2002, I was the lone voice in the room that voted against that war.** I knew it would be a costly, unending conflict. And over 15 years later, I'm still passionately against short-sighted military actions -- just like this airstrike -- in such a complex region. Thank you, Michael Franken, VADM USN (ret.)
Candidate for U.S. Senate, Iowa

---

name: Adm. Michael Franken (USN, ret.)
subject: This won't end well
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
Yesterday, the United States conducted an airstrike in Iraq that killed a powerful Iranian general. With this strike on foreign soil, the president has committed us to a course of action that leads us
|
---
| |
---

| | _A previous version of this email was sent prematurely. This is an issue of critical national importance, please see my corrected and updated thoughts below. - MTF_
* * *
This week, the United States conducted an airstrike in Iraq that killed a powerful Iranian general. **With this strike on foreign soil, the president has committed us to a course of action that leads us perilously close to another conflict in the Middle East.** I cannot predict what will happen as a result of this event. Certainly, risk to Americans everywhere has spiked -- from abductions to attacks on our embassies, military compounds, and shipping lanes across the globe**. Iran will surely retaliate, and this does not bode will for anyone.** Let me be clear, the United States has the capacity to defeat any adversary, but we must be overly careful to follow the law of armed conflict and be responsible to the world markets. From my 36 years in the Navy as a warfare officer, I have been involved in many of these operations and **I want to believe this administration truely grasps the severity of this action; or should i say, I hope President Trump grasps the depth of this action.** This is not the same as the operations to kill bin Laden or al Baghdadi. We killed a popular military leader working on behalf of a nation's president. And Iran has the capacity to conduct tactical operations across the entire region and beyond. **When the Pentagon was discussing the invasion of Iraq in 2002, I thought that was a bad idea -- unfounded, debased, and unwarrented -- and voiced my disaprproval.** I knew it would be a costly, unending war. And over 15 years later, I'm still passionately against short-sighted military actions -- just like this airstrike -- in such a complex region. Thank you, Michael Franken, VADM USN (ret.)
Candidate for U.S. Senate, Iowa
